ko-a2-scenario-a2_app_booking_confirmati.explanation: 請確認 App 預約的時間和地點。
ko-a2-scenario-a2_app_booking_confirmati.heading: 確認 App 預約

ko-a2-scenario-a2_ask_ingredient_prefere.explanation: 詢問是否有一般食材，並依照偏好做選擇。
ko-a2-scenario-a2_ask_ingredient_prefere.heading: 說明食材偏好

ko-a2-scenario-a2_ask_late_checkout.explanation: Ask if late checkout is possible and confirm the allowed time.
ko-a2-scenario-a2_ask_late_checkout.heading: 詢問延後退房

ko-a2-scenario-a2_ask_recommendation_bud.explanation: 請對方在小預算內推薦，並簡短說出想要的條件。
ko-a2-scenario-a2_ask_recommendation_bud.heading: 請對方在預算內推薦

ko-a2-scenario-a2_ask_transfer_platform.explanation: Ask for a transfer point and confirm a short two-step direction.
ko-a2-scenario-a2_ask_transfer_platform.heading: 詢問轉乘月台

ko-a2-scenario-a2_change_delivery_pickup.explanation: 禮貌地更改取件時間，並確認新的時間。
ko-a2-scenario-a2_change_delivery_pickup.heading: 更改取件時間

ko-a2-scenario-a2_change_ticket_time.explanation: Make a polite time-change request and confirm a simple alternative time.
ko-a2-scenario-a2_change_ticket_time.heading: 更改票券時間

ko-a2-scenario-a2_compare_two_menu_optio.explanation: 聽兩個菜單選項的差異，選出想要的一個並確認。
ko-a2-scenario-a2_compare_two_menu_optio.heading: 比較兩個菜單選項

ko-a2-scenario-a2_confirm_date_time_plac.explanation: Understand a short message and confirm the key details.
ko-a2-scenario-a2_confirm_date_time_plac.heading: 確認日期、時間和地點

ko-a2-scenario-a2_decline_with_reason.explanation: 請溫和地拒絕朋友的提議，並說出簡單理由和下次機會。
ko-a2-scenario-a2_decline_with_reason.heading: 用簡單理由禮貌拒絕

ko-a2-scenario-a2_describe_weekend_activ.explanation: 請用一兩句話簡短說明週末做了什麼。
ko-a2-scenario-a2_describe_weekend_activ.heading: 說明週末做了什麼

ko-a2-scenario-a2_exchange_wrong_item.explanation: 收到和訂單不同的物品時，請禮貌地請對方更換。
ko-a2-scenario-a2_exchange_wrong_item.heading: 更換拿錯的物品

ko-a2-scenario-a2_explain_simple_delay_r.explanation: Apologize, give one simple reason, and estimate the delay.
ko-a2-scenario-a2_explain_simple_delay_r.heading: 說明稍微遲到的原因

ko-a2-scenario-a2_fill_simple_form_help.explanation: 詢問一個不敏感的簡單欄位是用來做什麼的。
ko-a2-scenario-a2_fill_simple_form_help.heading: 請人幫忙看簡單表格

ko-a2-scenario-a2_invite_friend_activity.explanation: 向朋友提議一般活動，並簡短約好時間。
ko-a2-scenario-a2_invite_friend_activity.heading: 向朋友提議活動

ko-a2-scenario-a2_lost_item_followup_mes.explanation: 簡短詢問一般遺失物，並說出物品特徵。
ko-a2-scenario-a2_lost_item_followup_mes.heading: 詢問遺失物

ko-a2-scenario-a2_luggage_storage_pickup.explanation: Ask to store luggage and confirm pickup time/receipt.
ko-a2-scenario-a2_luggage_storage_pickup.heading: 寄放行李並確認領取時間

ko-a2-scenario-a2_make_simple_plan_seque.explanation: 和朋友安排兩個步驟的計畫，並確認先後順序。
ko-a2-scenario-a2_make_simple_plan_seque.heading: 安排兩個步驟的計畫

ko-a2-scenario-a2_plan_tomorrow_morning.explanation: Say a near-future plan with one simple sequence.
ko-a2-scenario-a2_plan_tomorrow_morning.heading: 說明明天早上的計畫

ko-a2-scenario-a2_report_room_problem.explanation: Report a simple room problem and confirm what hotel staff will do next.
ko-a2-scenario-a2_report_room_problem.heading: 說明房間問題

ko-a2-scenario-a2_request_room_change.explanation: Ask for a room change with a simple reason and confirm the move timing.
ko-a2-scenario-a2_request_room_change.heading: 請求更換房間

ko-a2-scenario-a2_reschedule_meeting_tim.explanation: Ask to change a time and confirm the new time.
ko-a2-scenario-a2_reschedule_meeting_tim.heading: 更改約定時間

ko-a2-scenario-a2_transport_delay_announ.explanation: Understand a delay duration and choose a simple next step.
ko-a2-scenario-a2_transport_delay_announ.heading: 理解交通延誤公告

ko-a2-scenario-a2_understand_hotel_notic.explanation: Understand a short hotel notice and confirm time, place, and simple rule details.
ko-a2-scenario-a2_understand_hotel_notic.heading: 理解飯店公告
